message:
fix(extensions_js): restore extension ID context during hostcall completion; expand test coverage

Hostcall completion context:
- extensions_js.rs: rename __pi_complete_hostcall to __pi_complete_hostcall_impl;
  new __pi_complete_hostcall wrapper restores __pi_current_extension_id from
  the pending entry's extensionId before dispatching, ensuring callbacks in
  promise chains see the correct extension context; uses Promise.resolve().then()
  to restore after microtask boundary

Bench schema validation:
- bench_schema.rs: 3+ new tests for non-positive pass-cell metrics (wall_clock_ms=0),
  non-numeric primary_outcomes metrics, and additional edge case validators

Installer regression:
- installer_regression.sh: add test_missing_option_value_fails() validating
  that --version without a value exits 1 with helpful error message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -230,6 +230,15 @@ test_unknown_option_fails() {
   assert_output_contains "$dir" "Unknown option"
 }
 
+test_missing_option_value_fails() {
+  local dir
+  dir="$(case_dir "missing-option-value")"
+  write_existing_pi_stub "$dir"
+  run_installer "$dir" --version
+  assert_exit_code "$dir" 1
+  assert_output_contains "$dir" "Option --version requires a value"
+}
+
 test_checksum_inline_success() {
   local dir artifact artifact_url checksum
   dir="$(case_dir "checksum-inline-success")"
@@ -471,6 +480,7 @@ main() {
   run_test test_help_lists_installer_flags
   run_test test_invalid_completions_value_fails
   run_test test_unknown_option_fails
+  run_test test_missing_option_value_fails
   run_test test_checksum_inline_success
   run_test test_checksum_mismatch_fails_hard
   run_test test_checksum_missing_manifest_entry_fails_hard
